title: agrostis tenuis f. montana
intro: Agrostis tenuis f. montana, also known as red-top bentgrass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and skin conditions. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Agrostis tenuis f. montana can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
